item.name: Deletes Multiple Parts of an Experience Including Users, Groups, Slugs, Domains, Versions, Endpoints, Views, and Workflows

request.name: Deletes Multiple Parts of an Experience Including Users, Groups, Slugs, Domains, Versions, Endpoints, Views, and Workflows

query.description: If this is set, Experience Users will not be removed.
If this is set, Experience Groups will not be removed.
If this is set, Experience Slugs will not be removed.
If this is set, Experience Domains will not be removed.
If this is set, all Experience Versions and their contents will be removed (except for develop).
If this is set, Experience Views (in the develop version) will not be removed.
If this is set, Experience Endpoints (in the develop version) will not be removed.
If this is set, all Experience Workflows (in the develop version) will ve removed.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Error if application was not found

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Build end-user web Experiences on top of Losant Applications: users, groups, endpoints, views, slugs, domains, versions, and the Experience Engine. Derived from the Losant Platform API (Bravado/Swagger 2) at https://api.losant.com/.
